title: Crucible Gate Ledger
description: The registry of every enforced rule in a repository, one row per gate.

rule.description: The invariant this gate enforces, in prose.

tier.description: T0 per-edit hook, T1 required per-change lane (load-bearing), T2 milestone/non-blocking, T3 prose-only.

checker.description: Repo-relative path to the checker script. Required for T0/T1/T2.

oracleSha256.description: The approved SHA-256 digest of the checker (the judge's pinned bytes). Drift requires independent approval.

trustedFiles.description: Extra inputs whose bytes are part of this gate's trusted computing base.

blockingCondition.description: always blocks every change; highRisk blocks only when a highRiskUnit is touched; advisory reports but never blocks.

reason.description: Required for tier T3 and for blockingCondition advisory: why this rule is not a blocking gate.
